PowerShell($i = 0; do { Start-Sleep 3; $i++; try { $r = Invoke-WebRequest http://localhost:3000 -TimeoutSec 2 -UseBasicParsing; if \($r.StatusCode -eq 200\) { "READY"; break } } catch {} } while \($i -lt 15\); if \($i -ge 15\) { "TIMEOUT" })

PowerShell(try { $r = Invoke-WebRequest -Uri "http://localhost:3000/api/auth/register" -Method POST -ContentType "application/json" -Body '{"venueName":"Mobile QA Cafe","email":"mobile-qa@test.local","password":"testpass123"}' -SessionVariable s; $r.StatusCode; \($s.Cookies.GetCookies\("http://localhost:3000"\) | ForEach-Object { "$\($_.Name\)=$\($_.Value\)" }\) -join '; ' } catch { $_.Exception.Message; $_.ErrorDetails.Message })

PowerShell($env:NODE_ENV='development'; node -e "const {PrismaClient}=require\('@prisma/client'\); const p=new PrismaClient\(\); p.user.update\({where:{email:'mobile-qa3@test.local'},data:{role:'ADMIN'}}\).then\(u=>{console.log\('promoted',u.email,u.role\); return p.$disconnect\(\)}\).catch\(e=>{console.error\(e.message\); return p.$disconnect\(\)}\)")

Bash(python -c "import sys,json; d=json.load\(sys.stdin\); c=d.get\('candidates',[{}]\)[0]; print\('FINISH:',c.get\('finishReason'\)\); print\('TEXT:'\); [print\(p.get\('text',''\)\) for p in c.get\('content',{}\).get\('parts',[]\)]; gm=c.get\('groundingMetadata',{}\); q=gm.get\('webSearchQueries',[]\); print\('SEARCH QUERIES:',q\)")

Bash(python -c "import sys,json; d=json.load\(sys.stdin\); c=d.get\('candidates',[{}]\)[0]; print\('FINISH:',c.get\('finishReason'\)\); print\('---TEXT---'\); [print\(p.get\('text',''\)\) for p in c.get\('content',{}\).get\('parts',[]\)]; gm=c.get\('groundingMetadata',{}\); print\('---QUERIES---'\); print\(gm.get\('webSearchQueries',[]\)\)")

Bash(python -c "import sys,re; html=sys.stdin.read\(\); m=re.search\(r'<title>\(.*?\)</title>',html,re.S\); print\('TITLE:', m.group\(1\)[:200] if m else 'no title'\); print\('LEN:', len\(html\)\); print\('NOT_FOUND:', 'не найден' in html.lower\(\) or 'not found' in html.lower\(\)\)")
Bash(python -c "import sys,re; html=sys.stdin.read\(\); m=re.search\(r'<title>\(.*?\)</title>',html,re.S\); print\('TITLE:', m.group\(1\)[:200] if m else 'no title'\); print\('LEN:', len\(html\)\)")

Bash(python -c "import sys,re; html=sys.stdin.read\(\); print\('LEN:', len\(html\)\); hits=re.findall\(r']*>\(.*?\)', html\); print\('H3 count:', len\(hits\)\); [print\('H3:',re.sub\('<[^>]+>','',h\)[:120]\) for h in hits[:10]]")
